narrative:
Wayne Township has 6,672 registered voters, with 49.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 32.6 percentage points.
